text: Just saw a sneak preview of the movie in Foxboro, right outside Gillette Stadium. If you are a Patriots fan, you will really enjoy this movie. This movie is going to make a fortune in New England. 2 sold out shows. Lots of elderly and lots of women. Most wearing Patriots shirts/hats/etc. The movie was a lot of fun...surprisingly emotional. The last half hour for Patriots fans is solid gold. Replaying highlights of Super Bowl with Atlanta. Locker room scenes with  Brady...Gronk...Edelmann....Amendola. The gang is all back and brings back great memories. The cast is wonderful and lots of fun. Enjoyed the interactions with Lou(Lily Tomlin) and Tom Brady. One locker room scene involving exchanging shirts is funny because I forgot all about it when it really happened. Gronk is a natural in front of the cameras. Big thumbs up. A solid 7 out of 10 if you are a casual football/Patriots fan. A solid 9 out of 10 if you love the Patriots. Last scene of the movie is great, by the way. Overall, a fun, fun movie.
